text.title: A11y Audit per-Screen Checklist Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply A11y Audit per-Screen Checklist end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: scope
step.action: Pin the screen + viewport size + theme variant.

step.name: manual-keyboard
step.action: Tab through entire screen; verify focus order + reachability + visible focus ring.

step.name: manual-sr
step.action: VoiceOver / NVDA pass; verify landmarks announced + labels read.

step.name: triage
step.action: Pin each of the 9 checks pass/fail; for fails add finding + fix.
